TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Chris Andersen hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas te 1978, byacing te 7 ru 7 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga California, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 208 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 111 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. 1982 kawas,Andersen payat kawas lga,cinngasal musa beh Texas. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ¶~ ®ńßris~…ē an*ers~…ēen ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa pzjaŇč pkaki Ē taj ks~…ēka Ē / pkaki Ē kks~…ēka Ē. kawas~…ē te ****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te * ru * rjax qu ńßint…£an nja, kinńßulan nja …£a ¶~ ®ali*ornia, ńßija …£a mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~…ēquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunő≤un kinwa…£iq nja, *** kunkin kin Ēs~…ēuw nja, ńßija …£a qutux nqu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari nő≤a. **** kawas~…ē,an*ers~…ēen pajat kawas~…ē l…£a, ¶~ ®inŇčas~…ēal mus~…ēa ő≤eńß texas~…ē. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč mas~…ēuq ms~…ēpuŇč mari s~…ēa ps~…ēpŇčan mari na maj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč l…£a ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: Chris Andersen hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas te 1978, byacing te 7 ru 7 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga California, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 208 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 111 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. 1982 kawas,Andersen payat kawas lga,cinngasal musa beh Texas. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ¶~ ®ńßris~…ē an*ers~…ēen ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa pzjaŇč pkaki Ē taj ks~…ēka Ē / pkaki Ē kks~…ēka Ē. kawas~…ē te ****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te * ru * rjax qu ńßint…£an nja, kinńßulan nja …£a ¶~ ®ali*ornia, ńßija …£a mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~…ēquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunő≤un kinwa…£iq nja, *** kunkin kin Ēs~…ēuw nja, ńßija …£a qutux nqu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari nő≤a. **** kawas~…ē,an*ers~…ēen pajat kawas~…ē l…£a, ¶~ ®inŇčas~…ēal mus~…ēa ő≤eńß texas~…ē. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč mas~…ēuq ms~…ēpuŇč mari s~…ēa ps~…ēpŇčan mari na maj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč l…£a ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
